# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-bucket-name
      AccessControl: AuthenticatedRead
      CorsConfiguration:
        CorsRules:
          - AllowedHeaders:
              - '*'
            AllowedMethods:
              - GET
              - PUT
              - POST
              - DELETE
            AllowedOrigins:
              - '*'
            MaxAge: 3000
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
  
  IAMPolicyForLambda:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: Policy for the application IAM role to access resources in S3
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AllowAccessToS3Bucket
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                Resource: arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket-name/*
